sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1463" key="a)/dotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄδοτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1463.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without gifts,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">573</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
